name: Chocolate Kahlua Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix all ingredients except the chocolate chips in a large bowl.
2. Gently fold in the chocolate chips using your hands, ensuring they are evenly distributed.
3. Pour the batter into a greased and floured bundt pan.
4. Bake at 350°F for 60 minutes (1 hour).
5. Allow the cake to cool completely before removing it from the pan.
